LeidenUniv.Tools

Class drawTillEnd_

  • java.lang.Object
    • LeidenUniv.Tools.drawTillEnd_
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ij.plugin.PlugIn

    public class drawTillEnd_
extends java.lang.Object
implements ij.plugin.PlugIn
    Plugin for drawing in an overlay element from current frame till the last one Useful for making movies with arrows
    Author:
    willemsejj

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      drawTillEnd_()
      Normal constructor used when the plugin is activated

      this can be called from a plugin

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void Draw_Channels()
      Draws the current overlay on all subsequent channels
      void Draw_Frames()
      Draws the current overlay on all subsequent frames
      void Draw_Slices()
      Draws the current overlay on all subsequent slices in the Z-stack

      not used in this plugin
